title: Admin Interpolation Variables Response
description: Context-aware interpolation variable picker (issue #56 v2): a token => human label map. The token is the value inserted as {{token}} (e.g. 'd.section_230', 'system.user_name', 'recipient.email', 'system.special.activation_link'); the label is the text shown in the CMS variable picker.

data_variables.description: Map of interpolation token => display label.
